records.question: Which programs named Kaku, launched in 2004, owned by Beijing Television (BTV), and originating from Beijing, have broadcast shares at most 4.2 percent during dates containing May?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT program.program_id FROM program
JOIN broadcast_share ON program.program_id = broadcast_share.program_id
WHERE broadcast_share.date LIKE '%May%' AND broadcast_share.share_in_percent <= 4.2 AND program.launch = 2004.0 AND program.name = 'Kaku' AND program.origin = 'Beijing' AND program.owner = 'Beijing Television (BTV)'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT program.Program_ID 
FROM program 
JOIN broadcast_share ON program.Program_ID = broadcast_share.Program_ID 
WHERE program.Launch = '2004.0' 
AND program.Name = 'Kaku' 
AND program.Origin = 'Beijing' 
AND program.Owner = 'Beijing Television (BTV)' 
AND broadcast_share.Date LIKE '%May%' 
AND broadcast_share.Share_in_percent <= 4.2

records.question: Which programs named Kaku from Beijing, owned by Beijing Television (BTV), that launched in 2004 or earlier, were broadcast at night during May?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT program.program_id FROM program
JOIN broadcast ON program.program_id = broadcast.program_id
JOIN broadcast_share ON program.program_id = broadcast_share.program_id
WHERE program.owner = 'Beijing Television (BTV)' AND broadcast_share.date LIKE '%May%' AND broadcast.time_of_day = 'Night' AND program.origin = 'Beijing' AND program.launch <= 2004.0 AND program.name = 'Kaku'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT program.Program_ID 
FROM program 
JOIN broadcast ON program.Program_ID = broadcast.Program_ID 
JOIN broadcast_share ON program.Program_ID = broadcast_share.Program_ID 
WHERE program.Owner = 'Beijing Television (BTV)' 
AND program.Origin = 'Beijing' 
AND program.Launch <= 2004.0 
AND program.Name = 'Kaku' 
AND broadcast.Time_of_day = 'Night' 
AND broadcast_share.Date LIKE '%May%'

records.question: Which programs that have related broadcasts and broadcast shares were launched in 2005.0 or later and originated exactly in Shanghai?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT program.program_id FROM program
JOIN broadcast ON program.program_id = broadcast.program_id
JOIN broadcast_share ON program.program_id = broadcast_share.program_id
WHERE program.launch >= 2005.0 AND program.origin = 'Shanghai'

SELECT program.Program_ID
FROM program
JOIN broadcast ON program.Program_ID = broadcast.Program_ID
JOIN broadcast_share ON program.Program_ID = broadcast_share.Program_ID
WHERE program.Launch >= 2005.0 AND program.Origin = 'Shanghai'

records.question: Which programs named Kaku originate from Beijing and are broadcast in the Morning?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT program.program_id FROM program
JOIN broadcast ON program.program_id = broadcast.program_id
WHERE broadcast.time_of_day = 'Morning' AND program.name = 'Kaku' AND program.origin = 'Beijing'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT program.Program_ID 
FROM program 
JOIN broadcast ON program.Program_ID = broadcast.Program_ID

records.question: Which programs are from Beijing and have been broadcast on any channel?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT program.program_id FROM program
JOIN broadcast ON program.program_id = broadcast.program_id
JOIN channel ON broadcast.channel_id = channel.channel_id
WHERE program.origin = 'Beijing'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT program.Program_ID
FROM program
JOIN broadcast ON program.Program_ID = broadcast.Program_ID
JOIN channel ON broadcast.Channel_ID = channel.Channel_ID
WHERE program.Origin = 'Beijing'

records.question: Which programs named Jiajia from Guangdong, owned by Southern Media Corporation (SMC), with a launch year no later than 2007, aired on CCTV-3 that has at least 0.31% channel rating, where the broadcast dates contain '01' and the share in percent is at most 1.1?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT program.program_id FROM program
JOIN broadcast_share ON program.program_id = broadcast_share.program_id
JOIN channel ON broadcast_share.channel_id = channel.channel_id
WHERE broadcast_share.date LIKE '%01%' AND channel.name = 'CCTV-3' AND program.name = 'Jiajia' AND program.origin = 'Guangdong' AND broadcast_share.share_in_percent <= 1.1 AND channel.rating_in_percent >= 0.31 AND program.launch <= 2007.0 AND program.owner = 'Southern Media Corporation (SMC)'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT program.Program_ID
FROM program
JOIN broadcast ON program.Program_ID = broadcast.Program_ID
JOIN broadcast_share ON broadcast.Channel_ID = broadcast_share.Channel_ID AND broadcast.Program_ID = broadcast_share.Program_ID
JOIN channel ON broadcast_share.Channel_ID = channel.Channel_ID
WHERE program.Name = 'Jiajia'
  AND program.Origin = 'Guangdong'
  AND program.Launch <= 2007.0
  AND program.Owner = 'Southern Media Corporation (SMC)'
  AND broadcast_share.Date LIKE '%01%'
  AND broadcast_share.Share_in_percent <= 1.1
  AND channel.Name = 'CCTV-3'
  AND channel.Rating_in_percent >= 0.31

JOIN broadcast_share ON program.program_id = broadcast_share.program_id
